svg.title: Illustrative anatomy of an Opportunity Action Table
svg.desc: Four report layers connect evidence to workflow while keeping facts and interpretation separate.
svg.text: A useful report separates four layers
Illustrative architecture. Every conclusion stays traceable to current evidence.

g.text: Source, URL, date, ID, type, status, evidence, caveat
Target, fit, confidence, eligibility, revenue motion, disqualifier
Official route, source contact, role, restrictions, enrichment status
Next action, owner, due date, CRM note, outreach angle, payload
